About WorkKudo

Making EveryRecognition|Matter at Work

WorkKudo is the employee recognition platform that turns everyday moments into lasting memories — bringing teams together through authentic appreciation.

Built for People
Our Story

Recognition shouldn't be an afterthought

WorkKudo was born from a simple frustration: meaningful employee moments were being missed. Birthdays forgotten. Work anniversaries left unacknowledged. Promotions barely noticed in a packed chat thread.

We built WorkKudo to change that — a platform where teams of any size can create beautiful, collaborative appreciation boards in under two minutes. No complicated setup. No lengthy onboarding. Just genuine recognition, made effortless.

MissionHelp every employee feel seen, valued, and appreciated.
VisionA world where gratitude is the default in every workplace.
What We Stand For

Our Values

The principles that guide every product decision we make.

❤️

Human First

Behind every metric is a person. We build tools that treat people like people.

✨

Authentic Always

No scripts. No corporate fluff. Real appreciation means real words from real people.

🚀

Effortlessly Simple

If it takes more than two minutes, we haven't done our job. Simplicity is the feature.

🌱

Culture as a Foundation

Recognition isn't a nice-to-have. It's the bedrock of every thriving workplace.

Platform Capabilities

What We Do

Everything your team needs to make recognition a daily habit.

🎨01

Beautiful Boards

Design appreciation boards tailored to any occasion — from birthdays to big wins.

💬02

Collect Messages

Teammates add messages, photos, and GIFs with zero friction — no account needed.

🏆03

Every Milestone

Birthdays, anniversaries, promotions, farewells — every moment gets its due.

📢04

Public Recognition

Shine a spotlight on outstanding contributors across your whole organization.

🌍05

Remote-First

Bridge distributed teams across time zones through shared, joyful celebration.

💎06

Lasting Memories

Every board lives on — a digital keepsake employees can revisit for years.

2 minAverage setup time
The Process

Up and running in minutes

No training. No setup calls. Just open WorkKudo and go.

01

Pick an Occasion

Choose from birthdays, work anniversaries, promotions, farewells, and more. Every template is built for the moment.

02

Invite Your Team

Share a link via Notion, email, or direct URL. Contributors add messages, photos, and GIFs — no login required.

03

Personalise the Board

Pick a backdrop, rearrange messages, add GIFs or drawings. Make it feel personal — because it is.

04

Deliver the Moment

Send instantly or schedule delivery for the perfect moment. The recipient gets a notification they'll never forget.

Universal Appeal

Built for Every Team

Whether you're a ten-person startup or a global enterprise with thousands of employees, WorkKudo scales with you.
